sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thukham sung pan suahtak nuam mahmah hi,
Jesuh in a si tawh a hong sawp hi;
Hong itna tawh hong gumzo hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Cing ding hi, ute naute’n um un;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhsakna pan i suakta zo a,
Aw khum in hong sam “Hong pai un” ci,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pasian’ Tapa cihna i ngah zo ta,
A pukte itna tawh hong phong zo
Hong sap ciang sihna pan hingkik ding,
